experiments.name: tile stage6 gray_stroke fixed
experiments.note: Tile overall recommended model after gray_stroke distribution repair.

experiments.name: tile stage7 crack fixed
experiments.note: Tile crack specialist; crack improves with a small overall tradeoff.

experiments.name: wood stage8 generalization
experiments.note: First wood run; pipeline transferred but scratch failed.

experiments.name: wood stage9 scratch fixed
experiments.note: Wood overall recommended model after scratch distribution repair.

experiments.name: leather stage10 generalization
experiments.note: Third-category pipeline worked but severely over-segmented.

experiments.name: leather stage11 precision cut fixed
experiments.note: Leather overall recommended model after good negatives and cut repair.

experiments.name: leather stage12 fold fixed
experiments.note: Fold recall specialist; improves fold but sacrifices overall precision.

timeline: Validated MVTec AD tile structure and mask alignment.
Generated rule-based tile synthetic defects as a baseline.
Used traditional masks and Stable Diffusion Inpainting for localized defect synthesis.
Built a no-synthetic-data anomaly detection baseline.
Showed combined traditional + diffusion data helps real test segmentation.
Expanded tile data and gray_stroke repair
Found gray_stroke failure and repaired its synthetic distribution.
Improved crack generation and validated class-level tradeoff.
Moved the pipeline from tile to wood and exposed scratch failure.
Repaired wood scratch distribution and improved wood overall metrics.
Moved to a third category and exposed severe over-segmentation.
Added train/good negative masks and fixed cut generation.
Improved fold recall while documenting the precision tradeoff.
Collected final metrics, timeline, and interview-facing project summary.
Added shared configuration, reproducibility checks, and final result dashboard generation.
Removed local path defaults, added configs, tests, CI, and project health reporting.
